one_line_ask: Take the client's raw pizza hero photo, logo, authored decal layout, and promo price list, and produce print-ready large-format window-decal PDFs — one per promotion — with professionally enhanced food photography and a vectorized logo.
brief: Our pizza restaurant needs several promotional window decals prepared for large-format storefront printing. We already have an approved sticker concept (the layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy are signed off) — we are NOT looking for a redesign, new logo, or rebranding. We need a designer to: (1) professionally enhance the raw food photography from our recent shoot so the pizza looks appetizing and prints cleanly at large size — fix the overall tone and exposure, warm it up so the cheese and crust look golden, boost the color of the toppings, and make the pizza itself pop against the background; (2) extend the photo so it fills the full decal panel including the print bleed, because the original crop is too tight; (3) take our actual logo file (currently a flat raster PNG) and convert it to a crisp scalable vector so it reproduces sharply at storefront size and replaces the placeholder; (4) using our approved decal layout (supplied as an InDesign template with merge fields for deal name, price, details and the hero image) and our price list, generate a print-ready PDF for EACH promotion in the same design style — Large 1-Topping Pizza Special, Pizza & Wings Deal, Family Feast, an
